source: Ultimate Wynncraft Lootrun Guide — Misc. Info tab
principle: Curses never penalise the PLAYER directly — they only buff mobs (user, 2026-07-21). A curse is difficulty scaling, not a resource cost. But see the Radiance thresholds: at high stacks 'difficulty' becomes lethality, so the advisor must not treat curse accumulation as free either.

radiance.minimumSpawnChance: 0% — Radiance does not occur at all without stacks
radiance.STRATEGY_IMPACT: These are hard breakpoints, not smooth scaling. Radiance Power 8 is the danger line — one-shot attacks end runs regardless of build, and under Hubris a death ends the run outright. The advisor should warn on approaching 8 Power rather than scoring Radiance linearly.
radiance.note: Radiant Hunter cleanses Radiance CHANCE specifically. Lights Out feeds Radiance Chance curses then converts all Radiance curses to pulls.

otherTypes.note: Wiki lists these as curse effects but does not confirm whether they are individually named/tracked like Radiance. Engine models them collectively as `generic`.
